results.title: The Money fish
results.creator_credit: Janet McLeod, Angela Borelli, Australian Broadcasting Corporation, Film Victoria and Two-Up Films
results.brief_description: Winter in Corner Inlet, Welshpool, Victoria and local commercial fishermen are angry with environmentalists and the Victorian Government who are intent on setting up marine national parks along the Victorian coastline to boost fishing stocks and restrict professional net fishing. Angst also exists between the commercial fishermen and those who practise recreational fishing. For Joe Pizzone, who has given up 26 years of shark fishing in Bass Strait for a new life as an inlet fisherman, owning his own boat and spending more time with his family, the threat of marine parks to his livelihood becomes the new challenge in his life. The documentary follows Joe as he goes about his daily life as a professional fisherman, revealing the harsh conditions, the long hours and the constant battle with the weather, the good days and the bad days and his absolute passion and determination to not just stand by and let bureaucracy and the “greenies” take over without a fight. His loyalty to the community and the local commercial fishing families sees Joe confronting the Environment Conservation Council head-on and taking a pro-active stance in defending the local community’s right to fish and earn a living. This is an interesting film in that it attempts to present all sides of such a vexatious issue, from the commercial fishermen to the proponents of recreational fishing, the Government and the environmentalists. NB: Warning contains some strong language.

results.title: The Molecular theory of matter
results.creator_credit: Encyclopaedia Britannica Films and ERPI Classroom Films
results.brief_description: Discusses simple molecular theory, diffusion of gases, evaporation of liquids, melting of solids, force exerted by molecules and Brownian movement. Suitable for upper secondary level.

results.title: The Mole in the zoo (K)
results.creator_credit: Zdenek Miler, Ceskoslovensky Filmexport and Short Film Studio
results.brief_description: An amusing animated film concerning the adventures of a clever little mole who finds himself in a zoo. This time the mole goes where angels fear to tread. He decides to help an ailing lion by pulling his throbbing tooth. No narration, music only. Suitable for lower and middle primary levels.

results.title: The Mole and the hedgehog
results.brief_description: An animated film about a hedgehog who, despite warnings from a mole and a mouse is captured and taken to a school lab, where he will certainly be stuffed. Mole and Mouse devise an ingenious method to rescue their friend.

results.title: The Mole and music (K)
results.brief_description: Mole is a music-lover. When he breaks a record that he is especially fond of, he does not just sit and mope, but with the help of Mouse sets out to make a new record from scratch. Suitable for lower and middle primary levels.

results.title: The Mohammedan world: beginnings and growth
results.creator_credit: John Smart and Coronet Instructional Films
results.brief_description: Presents scenes of mosques and historic landmarks in cities which are a part of the Mohammedan world; life in Baghdad, Damascus, Cairo and Old Jerusalem; discusses Mohammedanism and traces its development; shows the contribution of Mohammedans to western culture in literature, agriculture, chemistry, mathematics and the industrial arts.

results.title: The Modern prospector
results.creator_credit: Jean-Yves Bigras, Tim Wilson and ONF | NFB
results.brief_description: Instead of pick and shovel, the modern prospector employs all the resources of science to look for buried treasure. Aerial surveys, airborne magnetometers, instruments to measure the breadth and depth of ore bodies - with these the prospector can provide data to the company geologist to pinpoint the most promising drilling locations.

results.title: The Modern lithographer
results.creator_credit: Encyclopaedia Britannica Films and ERPI Classroom Films
results.brief_description: A detailed study of the techniques of lithographic artists, and the process of duplicating black and white originals by means of direct and offset lithography. The roles of the commercial photographer and the modern printing press in the mass production of attractive art prints, including advertising materials, are shown.
